positive: A detailed, high-contrast vector illustration of a majestic, stylized mountain range intersecting with a bioluminescent celestial nebula. The composition should be perfectly symmetrical and centralized, featuring bold, clean silhouettes of pine trees and soaring alpine peaks against swirling cosmic dust and deep indigo gradients. Incorporate elements of minimalist Japanese woodblock print aesthetic combined with futuristic neon glow, using limited but vibrant color palettes of teal, gold, deep purple, and crisp white. Highly detailed for apparel printing, suitable for screen printing, clean lines, strong negative space, high saturation, symmetrical composition, flat graphic design.
